case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. TYLER POMENS et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-20-2008 - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS TYLER ROMENS AND ROSANNA TAPIA. COMMISSIONER WILLIAM R. GARGANO, CLERK L. FONG, NOT REPORTED (218)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286.

Plaintiff Nasir Patel was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Tyler Romens, erroneously sued as Tyler Pomens or Rosanna Tapia, erroneously sued as Rossanna Tapia.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 7, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Nasir Patel, and against defendants Tyler Romens, erroneously sued as Tyler Pomens and Rosanna Tapia, erroneously sued as Rossanna Tapia as follows:

Plaintiff Nasir Patel shall recover from defendants Past Due Rent/Damages in the amount of $3,600.00 and costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $3,7195.00.

Plaintiff Nasir Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2048 Polk Street, #315, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than August 28, 2008.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Off Calendar
